mapper.insert: INSERT INTO merchants (username, password, shop_name, shop_description, shop_image, category, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{shopName}, #{shopDescription}, #{shopImage}, #{category}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM merchants WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM merchants ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE merchants SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE merchants SET category = #{category} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE merchants SET status = 'approved', close_reason = NULL, close_until = NULL, closed_at = NULL WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE merchants SET shop_name = #{shopName}, shop_description = #{shopDescription}, shop_image = #{shopImage} WHERE id = #{id}
